name: ISM Manufacturing PMI
notes: Headline US manufacturing PMI; >50 = expansion. Primary global growth signal. Source: ISM via DB.nomics.

name: ISM Manufacturing New Orders
notes: Most forward-looking ISM sub-index; leads headline PMI by 1-2m.

name: ISM Services PMI
notes: US services sector breadth; services = ~70% of US GDP.

name: ISM Services Business Activity
notes: ISM services business activity sub-index; comparable to mfg production.

name: ECB BLS Credit Standards — Enterprises
notes: ECB Bank Lending Survey: net % tightening credit standards for loans to non-financial corps. UNVERIFIED — run poc_dbnomics.py to confirm series code.

name: ECB BLS Credit Standards — Households
notes: ECB Bank Lending Survey: net % tightening credit standards for housing loans to households. UNVERIFIED — run poc_dbnomics.py to confirm series code.

name: EC Economic Sentiment Indicator (EA)
notes: EC headline ESI composite; >100 = above-average confidence. UNVERIFIED — run poc_dbnomics.py to confirm series code.

name: EC Industry Confidence (EA)
notes: EC industrial confidence sub-indicator; balance of positive minus negative responses. UNVERIFIED — run poc_dbnomics.py to confirm series code.

name: EC Services Confidence (EA)
notes: EC services confidence sub-indicator; balance of positive minus negative responses. UNVERIFIED — run poc_dbnomics.py to confirm series code.

name: Tankan Large Manufacturers DI
notes: BoJ Tankan: % favourable minus % unfavourable among large manufacturers. UNVERIFIED — run poc_dbnomics.py to confirm provider/dataset/series code.

name: Tankan Large Manufacturers Forecast DI
notes: BoJ Tankan: large mfrs expected DI for next quarter. Lead indicator. UNVERIFIED — run poc_dbnomics.py to confirm series code.

name: Tankan Large Non-Manufacturers DI
notes: BoJ Tankan: large non-mfrs DI; covers services/construction/retail. UNVERIFIED — run poc_dbnomics.py to confirm series code.
